title: ATER: Aterian Takes Further Steps to Improve Profitability
text: Aterian continues to take steps to improve profitability and reach adjusted EBITDA positive in the second half. The company has focused on SKU rationalization, reducing overhead costs, and improving operational efficiency. The company is concentrating on its core brands and eliminating underperforming products. Aterian's strategy is to stabilize the business and achieve profitability through continued cost reduction and margin improvement initiatives. The company's gross margins have expanded significantly through the rationalization process. Operating expenses have been carefully managed to ensure the company can achieve break-even or positive adjusted EBITDA despite revenue declines. The company is positioning itself for renewed growth in 2025 with a cleaner, more focused product portfolio and improved cost structure.
